description: Fetches the latest top five non-stablecoin crypto assets by Arrays MARKET_CAP, computes 10-day BTC-relative anomaly signals from Binance spot USDT klines with funding, open-interest, exchange-flow, and news confirmation, and emits a quiet notify/message sidecar for future P0/P1 alerts.
changelog: Initial crypto-only Portfolio Watch monitor with 10-day backfill and quiet ranked alerts.
